extraction.one_line_summary: AYUSO Juan attacked solo on the Albula Pass descent, gained nearly a minute on SKJELMOSE group, leapfrogged to podium from 1:18 down.
tactical_patterns: AYUSO attacked downhill rather than summit, exploiting superior descending to build gap after cresting Albula alone.
GALL Felix bridged with BILBAO/KELDERMAN group but couldn't follow SKJELMOSE chase, revealing yellow jersey vulnerability when isolated.
EVENEPOEL Remco lost time again despite shorter climb, signaling persistent weakness on sustained Alpine gradients before final TT.
SKJELMOSE chased hard on descent to limit AYUSO, took bonus seconds finishing second, showing podium defense instincts.

rider_signals.AYUSO Juan: positive: 20-year-old leapfrogged from 1:18 deficit to podium via solo summit-to-finish move, frightening descending speed.
rider_signals.GALL Felix: negative: yellow jersey dropped by SKJELMOSE group on descent after initially following, lost time and lead despite starting well.
rider_signals.SKJELMOSE Mattias: positive: reclaimed yellow via bonus seconds and chase work, positioned well for final TT with faster TT credentials.
rider_signals.EVENEPOEL Remco: negative: lost time again on Alpine pass, now plenty to do in weekend TT despite theoretically superior TT ability.
rider_signals.POWLESS Neilson: neutral: attacked early in breakaway multiple times but couldn't sustain when AYUSO unleashed final acceleration.
rider_signals.BILBAO Pello: positive: stayed with GALL Felix group on climb, finished alongside for podium gains when others faded.
